title: Head of POS (Processes, Organization and Systems)
description:
**Country POS (Processes, Organization and Systems) Partner Platform POS Leadership**

Solid line to the CHRO Country & Platform Lead

Dotted-line to the Group Processes, Organization & Systems VP

Location: Relevant Country

**Role purpose**

The Head of POS is firstly the POS Partner of the Platform Lead Country of this perimeter. The Head of POS has the same mission than all the POS Partners of other countries.

The Head of POS supports the convergence of HR processes, organization, and systems toward Group standards, fostering greater integration and coherence. The Head of POS drive operational excellence through compliance with Group standards, data quality, performance insights, and internal control, while allowing for necessary local adaptations.

As Platform POS Lead, contributes to Group-level projects, ensuring that global processes reflect operational realities and coordinates and empowers POS teams across countries, to ensure consistency, alignment, and impact, enhancing the efficiency of HR initiatives.

**Key Responsibilities at Country level**

**1. HR processes and HR Transformation**

* Champions the compliant deployment of Group POS standards. Conducts annual compliance reviews, ensures other Group HR standards (Talent, C&B, etc.) are applied, and co-develops corrective actions for gaps.
* Supports the formalization of local HR processes through standardized tools (SOPs, Handbooks, etc), while promoting continuous improvement (Lean, Six Sigma, Agile) to optimize quality, speed, and cost control.
* Under the responsibility of the Country CHRO, leads internal control for the HR function (2nd line of defence), by driving the Group annual campaign and ensuring local HR accountability over process controls.
* Relays HR POS transformation projects initiated by the Group (HR TOM, HR organization,…) and supports local HR teams in change management.

**2. HR Data Quality & Systems**

* Drives continuous improvement in HR data quality: ensures the reliability, completeness, and consistency of HR data in Group systems (e.g., Sezame), using monitoring and process mining tools (Visier, PowerBI, Celonis, etc.) for continuous tracking.
* Heads positions management (creation, modification, inactivation) according to POS standards, in coordination with stakeholders (HRBP, Finance, IT), and ensures regular updates of the HR organization in systems.
* Partners with POS and Data & Insights teams across platform countries to analyze data, resolve exceptions, and improve processes using dashboards and digital tools.
* Leads the rollout and adoption of digital HR tools in line with Group standards, acts as HRIS subject matter expert, and manages incidents, inquiries, and requests for process or system enhancements.

**3. HR Performance & People Insights**

* Monitors HR performance indicators at the local level.
* Produces People Insights analyses to support HR decision-making.
* Contributes to local Business Reviews by providing HRBPs with relevant and necessary indicators.
* Leads the HR budget and MTP processes, ensuring expense control and alignment with strategic and operational priorities.

  

**Key Responsibilities at Platform level**

**1. Platform POS Leadership**

* Manages all POS teams within the platform and ensures adequate coverage of POS responsibilities in each country, through effective organization , skills development and, when needed, resource mutualization across the platform.
* Holds accountability for ways of working (EWOW, EWOL) across all POS teams in the platform.
* Serves as the voice and reference for POS within the platform HR leadership team to ensure consistency and alignment.
* Represents the platform in the Group POS Leadership Team, relays country needs, and helps shape Group processes to reflect both global and local realities.
* Promotes collaboration and knowledge sharing across countries to harmonize development efforts and foster best practices.
* Is accountable for POS performance and continuous improvement across all countries within the platform.

**Required Skills**

* Proven experience in HR management, including HR operations, within an international and matrix environment.
* Proficiency in HR information systems, data management, and analytics and process tracking tools.
* Ability to lead transformation projects and support change.
* Strong collaboration skills, advisory posture, and ability to work across networks (local / platform / Group).
* Fluent in English.

**Success Indicators**

* Compliance rate with POS standards and other HR Group standards.
* HR data quality: completeness rate, accuracy, update frequency, resolution of exceptions.
* HRBP and stakeholder satisfaction regarding clarity, reliability, and usefulness of provided materials and indicators.
* POS performance measured across the platform (harmonization, best practice sharing, team skill development, operational efficiency).

**Business Unit:** Support Functions In Geographies

**Division:** SF In AMEA - GCC & Pak - UAE

**Legal Entity:** INTERNATIONAL POWER S.A., DUBAI BRANCH

**Professional Experience:** Skilled ( >3 experience <15 years)

**Education Level:** Bachelor's Degree

**Company Name:** ENGIE IMEA

Why this matters to us

Our organisation is an equal opportunity employer and is committed to fostering a diverse and inclusive workplace. We offer reasonable accommodations upon request for individuals with disabilities.

title: DIRECTOR - OPTIMIZATION & EFFICIENCY
description:
**1. Performance Monitoring & Analytics**

* Define, track, and monitor all terminal productivity KPIs including berth productivity, crane moves per hour, RTG/RMG utilization, equipment idle time, truck turnaround, and yard dwell time.
* Establish real-time operational dashboards linking vessel, yard, equipment, and gate performance.
* Perform root-cause analysis for underperformance, delays, or equipment inefficiencies, and propose corrective measures.
Prepare regular performance review reports for VP and senior leadership with trend analysis and improvement recommendations.  

**2. Continuous Improvement & Lean/Kaizen Leadership**

* Champion Lean Six Sigma, Kaizen, and GEMBA initiatives across all terminals to eliminate waste and reduce non-value-added activities.
* Identify process bottlenecks in vessel planning, yard management, and gate operations; design and implement sustainable process improvements.
* Lead cross-functional workshops with Operations, Planning, IT, Commercial, and Customer Service to standardize best practices.
* **3. Optimization & Digital Transformation**
* Lead the deployment and integration of advanced optimization systems (Auto-Vessel Planning, Yard Clash Module, AI-driven RTG scheduling).
* Collaborate with IT and vendors to fine-tune system parameters, ensuring full alignment with operational needs.
* Develop predictive models for yard capacity management, vessel productivity forecasting, and equipment maintenance optimization.
* Oversee automation initiatives in crane, yard, and gate operations to ensure smooth adoption and return on investment.
* Ensure seamless digitalization of manual/non-sense tasks, reducing human error and dependency on manual intervention.
* **4. Benchmarking & Strategic Efficiency Gains**
* Conduct internal benchmarking across Jebel Ali Terminals (T1–T4) and external benchmarking against leading global ports.
* Develop performance indexes for vessel calls, yard utilization, and gate operations, ensuring comparability and transparency.
* Identify opportunities for reducing unproductive moves, double-handling, and operational rework to improve throughput.
* Propose financial impact assessments of inefficiencies (e.g., cost of unproductive moves, delays, or underutilized equipment) to support business cases..
* **5. Leadership & People Development**
* Manage and develop a team of operational analysts, process engineers, system specialists, and optimization officers.
* Assign clear performance targets and ensure individual accountability aligned with organizational KPIs.

title: Lead Video Editor
description:
**Date posted:** 3 March 2025

**Pay:** 6,000.00 (AED) - 8,000.00 (AED) per month

Job description:

**Lead Video Editor**

**Pay:** AED 6,000.00 – AED 8,000.00 per month  
**Location:** Dubai, UAE (Full-Time, In-House)  
**Company:** INNOVEX AGENCY

**About INNOVEX AGENCY**

INNOVEX Agency is a leading Dubai-based creative and marketing agency specializing in **commercial videography**, **photography**, **3D and CGI production**, **branding**, **website development**, and **social media management**.  
We create **high-end visual content** for luxury, lifestyle, real estate, automotive, fashion, and government clients across the GCC.

**Position Overview**

INNOVEX Agency is seeking a **Lead Video Editor** — a highly skilled, visionary, and technically advanced professional responsible for overseeing all post-production activities across the agency.  
This is a **full-time, on-site position** based in Dubai.

You will lead and mentor the in-house post-production team while also managing remote editors and motion designers. You will personally handle advanced editing, color grading, and mastering of high-end visual content.

You will collaborate closely with the **Creative Director** and **Head of Production** to ensure smooth execution from pre-production to final delivery — contributing to storyboards, creative briefs, and visual direction.

**Reports to:** Creative Director & Head of Production

**Key Responsibilities**

* Lead and manage the entire post-production department (in-house and remote), including editors, colorists, photo editors, VFX artists, and motion designers.
* Participate in creative planning, offering expert input on storyboards, visual style, pacing, and edit flow with the Creative Director and Head of Production.
* Hands-on editing, color grading, and mastering using **DaVinci Resolve Studio**, **Adobe Premiere Pro**, **Adobe After Effects**, **Photoshop**, and **Illustrator**.
* Manage efficient file and project organization using **Google Drive**, including folder structures, backups, metadata, and asset versioning.
* Review, critique, and approve final outputs to ensure visual consistency, narrative clarity, and technical excellence.
* Integrate **AI-driven creative tools** (Runway ML, Pika Labs, Midjourney, Sora, ChatGPT, Leonardo.Ai, Kaiber, etc.) into workflows to enhance creativity and efficiency.
* Stay current with new AI trends, post-production technologies, and industry innovations.
* Collaborate closely with the production team to ensure creative alignment from shoot to edit.
* Mentor and train the editing, color grading, and animation team to strengthen storytelling and technical skills.
* Ensure all projects are delivered on-time and meet INNOVEX’s high quality standards.

**Requirements**

* Fluent in English (Arabic proficiency preferred).
* Minimum **5 years of experience** in post-production, including **2+ years in a leadership role**.
* Advanced expertise in:
* **DaVinci Resolve (editing, color grading, mastering)**
* **Adobe Premiere Pro**
* **Adobe After Effects**
* **Adobe Photoshop and Illustrator**
* Strong working knowledge of **AI creative tools** (Runway ML, Pika Labs, Midjourney, Sora, ChatGPT).
* Proven ability to manage both in-house and remote teams.
* Exceptional storytelling instincts and cinematic pacing skills.
* Strong organizational skills, especially in **Google Drive file management**.
* Ability to handle pressure, work with tight deadlines, and deliver consistent results.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and collaboration skills.

**Skills Summary**

* Cinematic editing & color grading
* Post-production leadership & workflow management
* Motion graphics coordination
* AI-enhanced video production
* Strong creative storytelling and pacing
* Google Drive structure & asset management
* Cross-department communication

**Working Hours:**  
9:00 AM to 6:00 PM

**Working Days:**  
5 working days

**Employment Benefits & Provisions**

INNOVEX Agency provides a comprehensive employment package including:

* Annual **round-trip flight ticket** to home country
* **Employment Visa & Residency**
* **Medical Insurance** (private coverage)
* **Government Insurance**
* **Company SIM card** with calls & data
* Access to licensed creative software (**DaVinci Resolve Studio, Adobe Creative Cloud, AI tools**)
* Company-provided **high-performance editing workstation**
* **Professional training & AI workshop** support

**Why Join INNOVEX?**

* Work with a multicultural, high-performance creative team
* Lead and shape the creative direction for major regional brands
* Access cutting-edge AI tools and state-of-the-art post-production tech
* Be part of a company redefining visual storytelling standards in the GCC

**Ability to Commute**

title: Revenue Operations Manager
description:
**Job Ad**
==========

**Revenue Operations Manager**

**We are seeking an experienced Revenue Operations Business Partner to act as a strategic advisor to sales leadership and frontline teams. This role is a blend of strategic sales planning and hands-on execution, designed to drive and optimize revenue acquisition efforts.**

**This position is an integral part of the broader Corporate Strategy and Operations team and supports Procore's continued revenue growth trajectory.**

**Success in this role hinges upon identifying critical business needs, driving measurable outcomes, and building excellent rapport with the sales, revenue operations, systems, and enablement teams.**

**This role reports directly to the Sr. Director, Revenue Operations Business Partners for International, and we are looking for someone to join the team immediately.**

**Role Responsibilities:**

* **Partner directly with the VP of sales, sales management and front line teams to help run the core operating rhythms of the business — forecasting, performance tracking, and accuracy maintenance across territory management, lead routing, and Salesforce**
* **Turn data into insight and action by creating performance diagnostics and surfacing trends around pipeline, productivity, and revenue efficiency.**
* **Partner with Strategy & Insights to analyze key metrics (e.g., NRR, GRR, market penetration, forecast accuracy) and leverage governance frameworks for pipeline hygiene and data integrity.**
* **Support annual and long-range strategic planning activities like segmentation design, quota setting, capacity modeling, and process redesigns**
* **Start process and operating model improvements that enable greater scalability, maturity, and efficiency.**
* **Champion change initiatives, like process improvements, AI pilots, systems enhancements, strategic analysis**
* **Partner with Global Enablement and Rev Process teams to translate strategy into execution through tools, workflows, and enablement.**
* **Support onboarding, process adoption, and ongoing refinement of sales motions to drive adoption of the “Procore Way” and improve productivity success**

**What We’re Looking For:**

* **Analytical and Operational Expertise:** **The ideal candidate is an analyst at their core, possessing direct sales operations and analytical experience with key "run the business" functions, including forecasting, capacity planning, and Quarterly Business Reviews (QBRs).**
* **Annual Planning Leadership:** **Must have led and supported annual planning cycles, encompassing GTM design, headcount and quota setting, scenario planning, territory carving, and managing system dependencies.**
* **GTM Systems Proficiency:** **Proficient in utilizing Go-to-Market (GTM) systems such as Tableau, Salesforce, territory modeling tools, and lead routing platforms.**
* **Data-Driven Insight:** **Experienced in leveraging leading indicators (e.g., pipeline, churn, headcount, revenue mix) to help teams achieve their goals.**
* **Strategic Communication:** **Possesses a strong ability to translate insights regarding risk and growth into actionable items and compelling narratives for Sales Leaders, Finance, and field teams, communicating confidently and concisely.**

**Education & Experience**

* **Bachelor’s in Business, Finance, Economics, or related field; MBA a plus**
* **Comfortable with data manipulation in Excel/G-Sheets and Google-Suite (Docs, Slides, Sheets)**
* **Minimum 3-4 years experience at a large-scale technology company required; enterprise software preferred**
company_description: A global company of groundbreakers, Procore Technologies collectively builds towards what’s next for our employees, industry, customers, and global communities.

title: Dubai SME Acquisition Evaluation Specialist
description:
**This Is a Highly Restricted Role**

Do NOT apply unless you meet ALL mandatory criteria below.  
Applications that do not meet the requirements will not be reviewed.

This is NOT:

* A sales role
* A brokerage role
* A business development role
* An IT business analyst role
* A general finance role

This is a deep acquisition evaluation role.

**Mandatory Requirements (Non-Negotiable)**

You must:

* Have **minimum 5 years experience in a Dubai-based Business Buying / Business Brokerage / SME Acquisition firm**
* Have worked specifically in **business evaluation, not sales**
* Have minimum **7 years continuous residency in Dubai**
* Have hands-on experience evaluating UAE businesses for acquisition
* Be able to independently analyze a business from zero to final acquisition recommendation

If you do not meet ALL of the above, do not apply.

**Role Objective**

You will fully dissect a business before acquisition.

Your work will determine whether Persian Horizon proceeds with purchase.

You must extract and validate:

* Financial reality
* Operational integrity
* Regulatory exposure
* Government compliance status
* Sustainability of earnings
* Hidden liabilities
* Real working capital needs
* Risk exposure

The Acquisition Director will act based on your findings.

**Core Responsibilities**

You will independently perform:

**Financial Deep Analysis**

* Full P&L, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow validation
* Bank statement reconciliation vs declared revenue
* VAT filing verification vs actual activity
* Payroll validation & labor cost integrity
* Supplier statement verification
* Margin sustainability testing
* Revenue manipulation red flag detection
* EBITDA normalization (owner add-backs, one-offs, related parties)

**Operational & Structural Review**

* Cost structure integrity
* Rent & labor ratio sustainability
* Capacity & throughput analysis
* Dependency risk (owner, supplier, landlord, key staff)

**Government & Legal Exposure Check**

* Trade license status & activity validation
* Fines / penalties exposure
* Visa liabilities
* Labor file status
* VAT compliance history
* Municipality or regulatory exposure (if applicable)

**Valuation & Decision Modeling**

* Earnings-based valuation ranges
* Scenario & sensitivity models
* Working capital & liquidity stress test
* Go / No-Go structured recommendation
* Risk register with mitigation pathways

**Mandatory Technical Competencies**

You must demonstrate:

* Advanced Excel financial modeling
* UAE SME valuation logic
* Due diligence frameworks
* Multi-source financial reconciliation
* Cash conversion cycle analysis
* Red-flag identification capability
* Structured risk assessment methodology

You must know UAE business-for-sale ecosystems and benchmarking methods.

**AI & Analytical Tools Requirement**

You must have practical experience using AI tools to:

* Support financial modeling
* Validate assumptions
* Perform scenario analysis
* Extract insights from large financial datasets

Applicants without AI-assisted analytical exposure will not be prioritized.

**Strong Advantage**

* Power BI (very high value)
* Structured due diligence tracker management
* Experience preparing internal acquisition memos
* Experience supporting transaction decision committees

**Personal Standard Required**

* Extremely analytical mindset
* High skepticism toward seller-provided data
* Zero tolerance for financial inconsistency
* Independent thinker
* Detail-obsessed
* Comfortable challenging incomplete documentation
* High confidentiality discipline

**Application Instructions (Strict Compliance Required)**

Your CV must clearly state:

* Years living in Dubai
* Years working in Dubai SME acquisition / brokerage firms
* Your exact role (analysis vs sales)
* Number of businesses evaluated
* Tools used (Excel models, AI tools, BI tools)

Applications without this clarity will not be reviewed.

This is a strategic acquisition gatekeeper role.  
If you are not deeply experienced in evaluating UAE businesses for purchase, do not apply.

Job Type: Full-time

Pay: From AED10,000.00 per month

title: Director Sales Representative (Insurance)
description:
At Moody's, we unite the brightest minds to turn today’s risks into tomorrow’s opportunities. We do this by striving to create an inclusive environment where everyone feels welcome to be who they are—with the freedom to exchange ideas, think innovatively, and listen to each other and customers in meaningful ways. Moody’s is transforming how the world sees risk. As a global leader in ratings and integrated risk assessment, we’re advancing AI to move from insight to action—enabling intelligence that not only understands complexity but responds to it. We decode risk to unlock opportunity, helping our clients navigate uncertainty with clarity, speed, and confidence.

If you are excited about this opportunity but do not meet every single requirement, please apply! You still may be a great fit for this role or other open roles. We are seeking candidates who model our values: invest in every relationship, lead with curiosity, champion diverse perspectives, turn inputs into actions, and uphold trust through integrity.

**Skills and Competencies**

* 8 -10 years of industry experience within (re)insurance and (re)insurance broking, with a proven track record of building senior-level client relationships
* Demonstrated success selling high value, complex software, SaaS, analytics or related technologies within financial services
* Deep understanding of catastrophic risk data, modelling, software and service solutions across underwriting and exposure management workflows
* Proven ability to negotiate and close large, high value commercial deals
* Strong capability to forecast and close business within quarterly cycles
* Demonstrated success building relationships and growing new territories and clients
* Fluent English and Arabic, written and spoken required
* Basic understanding of artificial intelligence concepts, with curiosity and enthusiasm for learning how AI tools can be used to improve processes and drive efficiency. Interest in exploring AI systems and a willingness to develop awareness of responsible AI practices, including risk management and ethical use
* This position offers a dynamic work environment, requiring up to 50% travel to engage with clients face-to-face, while also providing the flexibility of hybrid working

**Education**

* Bachelor’s degree in a quantitative, scientific or related discipline preferred
* Master’s degree or MBA desirable for candidates with familiarity and comfort with analytical, mathematical, and statistical concepts

**Responsibilities**

Drive revenue growth by building trusted client relationships and delivering workflow solutions across the Middle East insurance markets. Main responsibilities include:

* Own revenue growth and commercial impact across an assigned client portfolio
* Build and deepen long term relationships with client decision makers and key influencers
* Develop territory plans and client centric strategies to win new clients and support existing clients’ strategic goals
* Collaborate closely with Solution Practice to introduce new or customized solutions aligned to client needs
* Maintain accurate opportunity and pipeline reporting in Salesforce
* Partner with Solutions and Client Success teams to ensure seamless end to end customer experience
* Engage internal product and technical specialists to support client strategic initiatives
* Promote broader adoption of Moody’s Intelligent Risk Platform across client organizations

**About the Team**

Our Property & Specialty Solutions team is responsible for delivering advanced analytics, decision science solutions and model driven insights that help clients understand and manage catastrophic risk. We work across natural and man-made perils, supporting insurers, reinsurers, governments and corporations globally. By joining our team, you will contribute to innovative work across the Middle East region and support the adoption of data driven, AI enhanced risk intelligence tools that shape how organizations navigate complex risk environments

Moody’s is an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, religion, sex, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, sexual orientation, gender expression, gender identity or any other characteristic protected by law.  
  
Candidates for Moody's Corporation may be asked to disclose securities holdings pursuant to Moody’s Policy for Securities Trading and the requirements of the position. Employment is contingent upon compliance with the Policy, including remediation of positions in those holdings as necessary.
company_description: In a world shaped by increasingly interconnected risks, Moody’s helps customers develop a holistic view of these risks to advance their business and act decisively.

title: Off-Page Growth Specialist
description:
### **Position Summary**

At Property Finder, organic growth is driven not only by content and technology, but by **how the brand is perceived, referenced, and trusted across the market**. We are looking for an **Off-Page / PR Growth Specialist** to lead PR-driven growth initiatives that strengthen our authority, visibility, and credibility across external channels.

This role sits within the **Product-Led Growth function** and reports directly to the Product-Led Growth Director. The focus is strongly weighted toward **PR, earned media, market perception, audience engagement, and authority building**, with SEO acting as the framework through which impact is measured.

The ideal candidate brings a **strong PR / communications mindset**, understands how narratives spread across digital ecosystems, and can translate perception, engagement, and earned visibility into sustainable organic growth.

### **Key Responsibilities**

#### **PR-Led Off-Page Growth (Primary Focus)**

Own and execute PR-led off-page growth initiatives that strengthen brand authority and organic visibility  

Build and maintain relationships with journalists, publishers, editors, bloggers, and authoritative platforms  
Lead outreach efforts to secure earned media coverage, authoritative mentions, and citations  
Identify and convert unlinked brand mentions into trust and authority signals  
* Support ethical citation and reference opportunities on platforms such as **Wikipedia**, strictly following editorial standards, and knows in depth how to power the entity on the web.

#### **Market Perception & Brand Authority**

* Monitor and analyse **market perception**, brand sentiment, and narrative positioning across digital channels
* Conduct **social listening** and external signal monitoring to identify opportunities, risks, and emerging conversations
Identify how audiences talk about the brand, products, and categories — and translate insights into PR and growth opportunities  
Proactively shape narratives that reinforce trust, expertise, and authority in priority markets  

#### **Audience Engagement & Community Presence**

Engage authentically with high-signal communities (e.g. Reddit, forums, industry platforms) to build credibility and organic advocacy  

Identify opportunities for audience engagement that naturally lead to brand mentions and citations  
Support community-driven references and discussions without promotional or spammy behaviour  

#### **SEO Alignment & Growth Measurement**

Translate PR, engagement, and perception efforts into measurable SEO and growth outcomes  

Collaborate with Content and Technical SEO teams to align external authority signals with priority pages and themes  
Monitor authority growth, external signal quality, competitive positioning, and brand mentions using SEO and analytics tools  
Support backlink audits and quality assessments in partnership with SEO stakeholders  
* Connect PR activities to **measurable growth signals** (authority, visibility, demand capture, engagement)
* Evaluate which external signals (mentions, narratives, communities, publishers) drive **meaningful organic impact**, not just coverage
* Use data to prioritise PR efforts toward **high-leverage opportunities** rather than volume-based outreach

#### **Insight-Led PR & Opportunity Identification**

* Analyse **market, audience, and search demand signals** to identify PR-worthy narratives, data points, and angles
* Identify **unique data, trends, and insights** that can be transformed into earned media, citations, and authority signals
* Work with Product, Data, and Growth teams to surface **non-obvious insights** (market shifts, user behaviour, demand patterns) that resonate with media and communities
* Assess which stories, insights, or narratives are most likely to earn **credible coverage, references, and organic amplification**
Continuously test, learn, and refine PR angles based on performance, engagement, and downstream organic impact  

#### **Cross-Functional Collaboration**

* Work closely with Content, Brand, PR, Product, and Data teams to develop **PR-worthy, insight-led assets** (reports, market insights, data stories)
Partner with the Product-Led Growth team to align off-page initiatives with broader growth strategy and business priorities  
Knows in depth all things data, to showcase it in the PR campaigns, working closely with the data team to prepare the data briefs for data rich content messaging.  

### **The Person**

#### **Required Skills & Experience**

* **3+ years of experience in PR, digital PR, communications, earned media, or authority-building roles**
* Strong understanding of **market perception, audience sentiment, and brand narrative management**
Proven experience securing earned media, authoritative mentions, or citations through relationships and pitching  
Experience with social listening, audience insight gathering, or reputation monitoring  
Excellent written and verbal communication skills  
Working understanding of SEO principles and how off-page signals influence organic growth  
Analytical mindset with the ability to connect perception and engagement signals to performance outcomes  
Highly organised, proactive, and comfortable owning initiatives end-to-end  
* Strong **analytical and problem-solving mindset**, able to turn data and signals into PR opportunities
* Experience working with **data, insights, or research** to support earned media or authority-building initiatives
Comfortable collaborating with analysts, product managers, or growth teams to extract meaningful narratives  

#### **Nice to Have**

Experience in marketplaces, classifieds, or high-traffic consumer platforms  

Exposure to data-led PR or insight-driven storytelling  
Familiarity with SEO tools (Ahrefs, Semrush, similar)  
* Exposure to AI-assisted research, outreach, or monitoring workflows

title: Campaign Manager – Trading & Tools
description:
At Kpler, we are dedicated to helping our clients navigate complex markets with ease. By simplifying global trade information and providing valuable insights, we empower organisations to make informed decisions in commodities, energy, and maritime sectors.

  

Since our founding in 2014, we have focused on delivering top-tier intelligence through user-friendly platforms. Our team of over 700 experts from 35+ countries works tirelessly to transform intricate data into actionable strategies, ensuring our clients stay ahead in a dynamic market landscape. Join us to leverage cutting-edge innovation for impactful results and experience unparalleled support on your journey to success.

Campaign Manager – Trading & Tools

As the Campaign Manager – Trading & Tools, you will lead the planning, execution, and performance tracking of integrated growth marketing campaigns for Kpler’s trading business units. Partnering closely with Product Marketing, Directors of Business Units, Sales, and Regional Marketers, you will gather requirements, define campaign objectives, and orchestrate cross-functional efforts to launch new products and drive ongoing demand. You will collaborate with external agencies, vendors and internal teams to ensure campaigns are well-coordinated, localised and optimised for performance. Success in this role will be measured by on-time delivery, adherence to budget, and the ability to demonstrate campaign ROI through data-driven insights.

* + **Stakeholder coordination & requirements gathering:** Serve as the liaison between Product Marketing, Business Unit Directors, Sales, Business Development and Growth Marketing to collect campaign briefs, timelines, and performance goals. Translate stakeholder needs into a detailed campaign plan, including messaging, channel mix, asset requirements, and budget allocation.
  + **Campaign strategy & execution:** Develop and execute integrated campaign roadmaps for product launches, feature releases, and evergreen demand-generation programs across selected maritime business units
  + **Project management:** Own end-to-end project management: build timelines, manage task owners, mitigate risk and ensure all deliverables meet quality standards and deadlines.
  + **Performance measurement & analytics:** Define key performance indicators (KPIs) for each campaign; conduct post-campaign analysis, synthesising data from CRM to surface insights and actionable recommendations. Work with Marketing Operations to ensure data cleanliness and iterate on campaign elements to improve ROI.
  + **Budget & vendor management:** Monitor campaign budgets and track spend against projections. Manage relationships with external agencies, negotiate scopes of work, and ensure deliverables align with budget and timeline.

### **Skills & Competencies**

* + **Experience:** 4-6 years of B2B marketing experience, preferably within the commodity trading commodities, with a proven track record managing integrated marketing campaigns from planning through execution and analysis.
  + **Project management expertise:** Strong organisational skills with the ability to manage multiple simultaneous campaigns across different business units. Experience with project management tools to build and maintain detailed project plans.
  + **Data & analytics proficiency:** Hands-on experience with marketing automation platforms (HubSpot) and CRM systems (Salesforce). Ability to translate data into clear, concise reports and make data-driven recommendations.
  + **Marketing skillset:** Solid understanding of demand generation tactics, including digital advertising, email marketing, ABM and event marketing.
  + **Soft skills:** Initiative-driven mindset with a bias for action and the ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment. Detail-oriented with a commitment to quality and a strong sense of ownership over campaign outcomes. Collaborative team player who can build trust quickly and influence cross-functional teams without direct authority.
  + **Communication:** Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English; able to translate complex ideas into clear, compelling marketing assets.
  + **Stakeholder & vendor management:** Excellent interpersonal and communication skills to liaise effectively with internal stakeholders (Product Marketing, Sales, Regional Marketers) and external agencies. Experience managing external partners, ensuring deliverables meet scope, budget, and timeline.

We are a dynamic company dedicated to nurturing connections and innovating solutions to tackle market challenges head-on. If you thrive on customer satisfaction and turning ideas into reality, then you’ve found your ideal destination. Are you ready to embark on this exciting journey with us?

**We make things happen**

We act decisively and with purpose, going the extra mile.

**We build together**

We foster relationships and develop creative solutions to address market challenges.

**We are here to help**

We are accessible and supportive to colleagues and clients with a friendly approach.

Our People Pledge

Don’t meet every single requirement? Research shows that women and people of color are less likely than others to apply if they feel like they don’t match 100% of the job requirements. Don’t let the confidence gap stand in your way, we’d love to hear from you! We understand that experience comes in many different forms and are dedicated to adding new perspectives to the team.

Kpler is committed to providing a fair, inclusive and diverse work-environment. We believe that different perspectives lead to better ideas, and better ideas allow us to better understand the needs and interests of our diverse, global community. We welcome people of different backgrounds, experiences, abilities and perspectives and are an equal opportunity employer.

By applying, I confirm that I have read and accept the Staff Privacy Notice

These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.

title: Executive Assistant
description:
Who We Are

Boston Consulting Group partners with leaders in business and society to tackle their most important challenges and capture their greatest opportunities. BCG was the pioneer in business strategy when it was founded in 1963. Today, we help clients with total transformation-inspiring complex change, enabling organizations to grow, building competitive advantage, and driving bottom-line impact.  
  
To succeed, organizations must blend digital and human capabilities. Our diverse, global teams bring deep industry and functional expertise and a range of perspectives to spark change. BCG delivers solutions through leading-edge management consulting along with technology and design, corporate and digital ventures—and business purpose. We work in a uniquely collaborative model across the firm and throughout all levels of the client organization, generating results that allow our clients to thrive.

What You'll Do

As a dynamic, driven Executive Assistant (EA), you will provide executive administrative support for a team of Managing Director & Partner(s), and/or Partner(s) taking full responsibility for the maintenance of a demanding schedule. Represent BCG to all internal and external contacts in a manner consistent with BCG’s value statement.

While consultants spend most of their time at the client site, back here at home office, the Operations Team that consists of a group of really smart, team-oriented people will surround you. EAs actively participate in office life, are flexible and willing to help fellow team members, and collaborate across functions.

YOU'RE GOOD AT

* Managing and maintaining busy outlook calendars highlighting potential conflicts, managing end-to-end travel logistics (bookings & amendments of flights, hotels, cars etc), conference calls, meetings etc.
* Utilizing efficiency tools such as ShareCal and Loop to improve scheduling effectiveness
* Developing working relationships with external clients and their assistants to facilitate the information flow and scheduling process
* Embracing and utilizing AI-powered tools to enhance productivity and administrative efficiency; proactively seeking opportunities to upskill and integrate emerging technologies into daily workflows
* Maintaining and developing working relationships with various BCG support staff members to maintain information flow and scheduling process
* Organizing and scheduling client and internal meetings and events; prepare logistics/equipment arrangements
* Providing vacation cover to other Executive Assistants
* Coordinating meetings, arranging conference bridges, reserving conference rooms, organizing catering
* Where appropriate preparing and circulating meeting agendas and materials, attend meetings, take and distribute meeting notes, follow up on action items
* Providing administrative support to PA events: prepare invitation mailings, manage responses, arrange catering, venues and on the ground support
* Organizing and maintaining online systems for PA
* Managing client contacts for CRM/Contact Management
* Organizing and maintaining electronic filing system
* Preparing weekly timesheets and expense reports
* Maintain highest level of internal and external confidentiality

**Please note that this role follows a Sunday–Thursday workweek to support regional business operations.**

What You'll Bring

* A minimum of 4-5 years’ experience in a fast-paced environment supporting senior executives is strongly preferred.
* Strong service orientation:
  + Maturity and flexibility to work both independently and in cooperation with others
  + High level of self-motivation and initiative
  + Willingness to exercise good judgment and make decisions based on logic and common sense
* Excellent organizational skills
  + Ability to anticipate alternate solutions and be prepared with contingency plans as needed in a calm and efficient manner
  + Superior attention to detail and accuracy
  + Follow through/ownership of tasks to completion
  + Willingness to consistently check and double-check all aspects of Partner/Principals schedule (including travel, client meeting preparations and materials)
* Ability to multi-task and complete a variety of projects in a fast-paced environment
* Ability and willingness to work overtime on projects and tasks as required
* Knowledge and experience of the Middle East and local practices
* Proficient computer skills: Windows, Word, Excel, PowerPoint, Outlook
* Organizational skills: ability to handle competing priorities and to work effectively in a Challenging, fast-paced environment
* Service oriented, flexible, attentive to detail team player
* Ability to respect all BCG information as personal and confidential

Who You'll Work With

You'll be working within a closely-knit EA team made up on Senior Executive Assistants, Executive Assistants and Admin Assistants all reporting into one of the four Team leaders who report into the Admin Services Senior Manager. You'll be supporting a team of Managing Director & Partner(s), and Partner (s) and you'll work with the other administrative team members to back each other up and help each other out when things get extra busy or when someone is out of the office. The team is very collaborative and enjoys learning and mentoring each other. Your manager will be a great resource for support and trouble-shooting and will provide developmental guidance and support as your grow your career at BCG.

Boston Consulting Group is an Equal Opportunity Employer. All qualified applicants will receive consideration for employment without regard to race, color, age, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity / expression, national origin, disability, protected veteran status, or any other characteristic protected under national, provincial, or local law, where applicable, and those with criminal histories will be considered in a manner consistent with applicable state and local laws.
  
BCG is an E - Verify Employer. Click here for more information on E-Verify.

title: Director Of Product Management
description:
Role Summary

We are hiring a Director of Product Management to lead a portfolio of products and platform capabilities in a high-scale digital platform environment, while also owning delivery leadership. You will set direction, drive outcomes, and build strong teams that ship with speed and quality. This role requires AI fluency and a track record of automating business operations to achieve scalability, reducing manual work, improving cycle times, and increasing operational reliability across the company.

**What You’ll Own**

Product strategy and roadmap for a defined portfolio, tied to measurable outcomes.

Delivery excellence across squads: planning, coordination, dependency management, and release readiness.

AI-enabled initiatives across your portfolio, from discovery to measurable outcomes.

Operational automation strategy for scalable execution across key business processes.

Key Responsibilities

Strategy & Portfolio Leadership

Own product strategy across a defined portfolio, aligned to company priorities and customer value.

Translate strategy into clear bets, sequencing, and measurable outcomes across growth, engagement, retention, monetization, and trust.

Lead quarterly planning and roadmap governance, balancing speed, quality, and long-term platform health.

Make principled trade-offs across customer experience, scalability, reliability, privacy, and cost-to-serve.

AI-Enabled Product Leadership

Identify and prioritize AI opportunities across the platform that deliver measurable customer and business impact.

Partner with Engineering and Data to shape AI-enabled initiatives into clear product requirements and delivery plans.

Ensure AI features are measurable and monitored post-launch, with clear success metrics and iteration loops.

Automation & Operational Scalability

Identify high-friction operational workflows and lead automation initiatives that reduce manual effort and cost-to-serve.

Partner with Operations, Finance, Support, and Engineering to map processes, define requirements, and deliver scalable automation.

Improve throughput and reliability through workflow automation, integrations, and systemization of recurring processes.

Establish measurable targets for operational automation (cycle time, error rate, manual hours saved, SLA compliance) and drive continuous improvement.

Execution & Delivery Leadership

Lead the Delivery team to ensure predictable, high-quality execution across multiple squads.

Establish delivery standards and rituals: sprint and release planning, execution tracking, risk management, dependency mapping, and escalation paths.

Drive cross-functional coordination across Engineering, Design, Data, and Operations to remove blockers early and keep teams moving.

Own release readiness and go-live processes, including phased rollouts and post-release retrospectives.

Product Craft & Decision Quality

Set the bar for product artifacts and delivery readiness: PRDs, acceptance criteria, rollout strategies, launch plans, and post-launch measurement.

Ensure initiatives are instrumented and measurable, with clear baselines, targets, and monitoring.

Raise the quality of prioritization by grounding decisions in evidence, customer insights, and business impact.

People Leadership & Org Building

Lead, coach, and develop Product Managers and Delivery leads, including hiring, performance management, and career growth.

Build a culture of accountability, ownership, and delivery excellence, without sacrificing product quality.

Create consistency in how teams plan, execute, and communicate progress.

Stakeholder & Go-To-Market Leadership

Serve as a senior partner to Marketing, Sales, Partnerships, and Customer teams to shape launches, positioning, and enablement.

Communicate product direction, progress, risks, and trade-offs with clarity to leadership and cross-functional partners.

**What Success Looks Like**

A roadmap that is understood, trusted, and tied to measurable outcomes.

Delivery becomes predictable: fewer surprises, clearer ownership, faster decision cycles, and healthier execution rhythms.

AI-enabled initiatives ship with measurable impact and improve through disciplined iteration.

Operational automation reduces manual effort, improves SLAs, and enables scale without linear headcount growth.

Core platform and product metrics improve consistently quarter over quarter.

**Required Qualifications**

8+ years of Product Management experience, with 3+ years leading Product Managers and/or delivery functions.

Required: experience building and scaling high-scale digital platforms, including high traffic environments, large event volumes, and complex cross-team dependencies.

Proven track record leading multi-team roadmaps and shipping customer-facing experiences and platform capabilities.

Required: AI fluency, with experience shipping AI-enabled product capabilities or leading teams delivering them in production environments.

Required: experience automating business operations to achieve scalability, including workflow automation, systems integrations, and reducing operational cost-to-serve.

Strong product judgment with the ability to turn ambiguity into clear priorities and execution plans.

Strong analytical mindset: metrics design, funnel and cohort thinking, experimentation literacy, and data-driven prioritization.

Strong cross-functional leadership with Engineering and Design, including credibility in technical and UX trade-offs.

Excellent communication and stakeholder management, including executive-ready updates and decision narratives.

Preferred Qualifications

Experience in marketplace or multi-sided platforms.

Experience scaling delivery operations across multiple squads (program management, release management, operational cadences).

Familiarity with modern experimentation and analytics stacks.

Experience operating in privacy-sensitive environments.

  

**Department**

Product Management

**Locations**

Dubai

**Remote status**

Fully Remote

title: Tech Director
description:
**Tech Director (Head of Engineering)** **Globant — Riyadh, KSA**
=================================================================

**Location:** Riyadh, Saudi Arabia (on-site). Alternative locations: Jordan, Lebanon, UAE, Egypt — with regular travel to Riyadh required.
==========================================================================================================================================

**Reports to:** VP of Technology
================================

**Direct scope:** 50+ engineers across back end and front end disciplines
=========================================================================

**Role type:** New role | Permanent | Leadership/Strategy
=========================================================

**About the Role**
==================

This is a senior engineering leadership position responsible for the strategic direction, delivery performance, and technical maturity of Globant's software engineering function in the MENA region. The Head of Engineering will own the engineering roadmap, drive AI adoption, establish engineering culture and standards, and lead a growing organisation of 50+ engineers across back end and front end teams.


**Key Priorities**
==================

* **Improve delivery velocity** — Identify and remove bottlenecks across the engineering lifecycle. Establish metrics, streamline release processes, and improve predictability of delivery across teams.
  =======================================================================================================================================================================================================

* **Drive AI adoption across engineering** — Define and execute a strategy for embedding AI into engineering workflows, tooling, and product development. Champion the use of AI-assisted development, testing, and operations to accelerate output and quality.
  ==============================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

* **Build engineering culture and processes** — Establish engineering standards, governance, and ways of working. Improve tooling, development processes, and code standards across teams. Create a culture of ownership, technical excellence, and continuous improvement. Introduce career frameworks, knowledge sharing, and communities of practice.
  

* **Tackle technical debt and platform modernisation** — Assess the current estate, prioritise remediation, and lead modernisation efforts aligned with long-term architectural goals. Balance delivery demands with sustainable engineering practices.
  =====================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

* **Scale the engineering organisation** — Partner with talent acquisition to grow the team in line with business demand. Build a hiring strategy across Riyadh and alternative locations (Jordan, Lebanon, UAE, Egypt), ensuring quality and cultural alignment.
  ===============================================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

**Key Responsibilities**
========================

* Set the technical vision and engineering strategy aligned with business objectives
  ==================================================================================
* Lead and develop engineering managers, SMEs, and senior engineers across all disciplines
  ========================================================================================
* Own engineering delivery performance, reporting, and continuous improvement
  ===========================================================================
* Collaborate closely with architecture, cybersecurity, product, delivery, design, QA, data, and DevSecOps/platform disciplines to ensure alignment and cohesive outcomes across the engineering organisation
  ===========================================================================================================================================================================================================
* Represent engineering in senior leadership forums and client engagements
  ========================================================================
* Manage stakeholder relationships across the organisation and with external partners
  ===================================================================================
* Champion modern engineering practices including DevSecOps, CI/CD, observability, and automation
  ===============================================================================================
* Ensure compliance with security, governance, and regulatory requirements
  ========================================================================

**Technical Landscape**
=======================

The role provides strategic oversight across the following technology stack. Hands-on coding is not expected, but a strong understanding of the technologies in use and the ability to engage credibly with technical teams is required.
========================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

**Back End:** NodeJS, Adobe Experience Manager, Apigee, RESTful APIs, microservices architecture, event-driven architecture, SQL and NoSQL databases, OAuth/JWT, message queuing and async processing.
======================================================================================================================================================================================================

**Front End:** Flutter, Svelte, HTML5/CSS3/JavaScript/TypeScript, Android and iOS native development, component-based architecture, micro frontend patterns, progressive web applications, accessibility (WCAG), state management.
==================================================================================================================================================================================================================================

**AI & Emerging Tech:** AI-assisted development tooling, Agentic AI, LLMOps, AI integration into engineering workflows, evaluation of emerging AI/ML technologies for engineering productivity.
===============================================================================================================================================================================================

**Requirements**
================

* Significant experience leading engineering organisations of 50+ in a Tech/SaaS environment
  ==========================================================================================
* Proven track record of improving delivery velocity and engineering maturity at scale
  ====================================================================================
* Experience introducing AI tooling and practices into engineering teams
  ======================================================================
* Strong understanding of back end and front end technologies — able to engage credibly with engineering teams and contribute to technical discussions
  ====================================================================================================================================================
* Demonstrated ability to work effectively across disciplines including architecture, cybersecurity, product, delivery, design, and QA
  ====================================================================================================================================
* Experience building engineering teams across multiple geographies, ideally in the MENA region
  =============================================================================================
* Strong stakeholder management and communication skills with senior/executive audiences
  ======================================================================================
* Experience with engineering governance, standards, and platform modernisation
  =============================================================================
* Track record of building engineering culture, career frameworks, and communities of practice
  ============================================================================================

**Desirable**
=============

* Experience in a consulting or digital services environment
  ==========================================================
* Experience working with Saudi Arabia's digital transformation landscape (e.g. Vision 2030 aligned programmes)
  =============================================================================================================

title: Director - Product Management
description:
Qiddiya seeks a strategic and visionary Head of Product Management to lead and mature the Product Management function across its Digital & Customer Experience (D\*CE) organization. This is a critical senior leadership role that defines and governs the digital product roadmap spanning Web, Mobile, CRM, MarTech, Loyalty, AI, and Platform domains — ensuring all product investments drive measurable customer and commercial value.  
  
Based in Riyadh, Kingdom of Saudi Arabia, this is a unique opportunity to architect the digital vision for one of the region’s most ambitious destinations. The role transforms creative ambition into an actionable roadmap that balances innovation with operational discipline. Working alongside the Head of Delivery Assurance, you will unify product efforts across business lines into one cohesive portfolio that delivers outcomes — not just outputs.  
  
You will inspire clarity in complexity — bringing together operating companies, partners, and internal teams to prioritize what matters most. This is a role for a leader who thrives at the intersection of strategy, technology, and customer experience.

Key Responsibilities

* Own the end-to-end digital product strategy and portfolio for all D\*CE domains.
* Establish a single, transparent enterprise roadmap aligned to business KPIs and milestones.
* Drive value-based prioritisation ensuring measurable ROI and customer impact
* Lead engagement across operating companies, aligning commercial and guest priorities.
* Partner with Delivery and Engineering to ensure roadmap feasibility and delivery integrity.
* Translate vision into tangible goals and quarterly outcomes.
* Establish governance standards, frameworks, and KPIs for product lifecycle management.
* Build product management capability and maturity across the organisation.
* Ensure backlog quality, transparency, and alignment to business strategy.
* Represent the Digital Roadmap to C-suite and executive forums with confidence and clarity.
* Champion data-driven decision-making and customer-centric innovation.
* Build strong stakeholder relationships across digital, marketing, and operational teams.

  
**Requirements**  

* 12+ years of experience in digital product management, with 5+ in senior leadership roles.
* Proven success leading cross-domain product portfolios in large-scale consumer or destination environments.
* Deep understanding of digital ecosystems including AEM, CRM, Martech, and Data & AI platforms.
* Strong knowledge of Agile, SAFe, or scaled delivery frameworks.
* Demonstrated ability to influence senior stakeholders and translate strategy into execution.

  
**Benefits**

Comprehensive benefits package

title: Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services
description:
**About the Role:**  
**Grade Level (for internal use):** 12
  
**The Role:** Head of KSA, Business Development Climate & Sustainability Services
  
  
**The Team:** The candidate will be responsible for leading S&P Global’s Climate and Sustainability Services market expansion throughout the Kingdom, focusing on three primary client pillars: Financial Institutions, Non-Financial Corporates in hard-to-abate sectors, and Government Related Entities (GREs). This role demands deep client engagement and high-level strategic conversations, requiring the ability to connect across ministries, national champions, regulators, corporates, and financial institutions. Key expectations include building a robust on-the-ground network, meeting with senior executives and project owners, pitching tailored sustainability solutions, and designing offerings that leverage the full range of S&P Global’s data, analytics, platforms, and advisory services. The candidate will play a pivotal role in positioning S&P Global as a trusted partner in climate and sustainability, ensuring that client needs are met with innovative and impactful solutions.
  
  
**Responsibilities and Impact:**  
Market Expansion & Positioning - Establish S&P Global’s sustainability and climate services in KSA and boost local market presence through ongoing engagement with ministries, corporates, and financial institutions. Build a strong network to enhance visibility and leadership.
  
Client Engagement & Relationship Building - Cultivate lasting relationships with senior decision-makers and engage in informed discussions on climate, transition planning, ESG, and sustainability. Act as a strategic partner for continuous client engagement.
  
Business Development & Growth - Pursue new opportunities with financial institutions, corporates, and government entities. Lead pitches and design tailored solutions utilizing S&P’s offerings. Lead internal teams in preparing proposals aligned with regional priorities.
  
Solution Integration & Delivery Coordination - Turn client needs into actionable projects using data, analytics, and advisory platforms. Coordinate globally for seamless delivery and contribute to RHQ’s balanced onshore/offshore delivery model.
  
  
**What We’re Looking For:****Basic Qualifications:**  
Exclusive for Saudi Nationals and be based in Riyadh to ensure essential on-the-ground presence
  
10+ years of experience in a consulting role, ideally covering banking, investment, risk, financing, or sustainability-related areas
  
Demonstrate fluency in Arabic and English, with exceptional business writing and executive-level communication skills
  
Proven experience building or scaling a business, team, or regional market presence
  
Strong, hands-on experience in sustainability and climate topics, including advisory, technical analysis, or climate-related risk
  
Deep technical knowledge of ISSB, PCAF, GRI, and decarbonization standards
  
Experience with quantification of financed emissions, such as PCAF methodologies
  
Familiarity with local industry dynamics in Saudi Arabia, especially hard-to-abate sectors
  
Experience in Scope 1 and Scope 2 emissions quantification
  
Experience working in international organizations with exposure to global teams and matrix structures
  
Demonstrated leadership experience, including managing teams, influencing stakeholders, and delivering cross-functional outcomes
  
Strong project management capabilities, able to lead complex sustainability engagements end to end
  
  
**Preferred Qualifications:**  
Deliver high-quality executive presentations and develop compelling materials using advanced PowerPoint skills
  
Clearly and persuasively articulate complex sustainability concepts to diverse audiences
  
Engage confidently with high-level stakeholders in both technical and strategic discussions
  
Report directly to the Global Head of Climate and Sustainability Services.
  
Contribute to the development of a hybrid delivery model by integrating onshore Riyadh-based staff with offshore and nearshore teams to support project execution
  
Commit to regular travel within Riyadh; travel outside the Kingdom is limited and not a priority
  
Drive business retention and expansion by strengthening client relationships and integrating data, analytics, services, and platforms to support account growth through upselling and cross-selling initiatives
  
Lead the transition to recurring and subscription-based models by converting one-off projects into ongoing subscriptions and facilitating client adoption of S&P tools
  
Identify and develop new key client opportunities by targeting financial institutions and government entities, expanding market presence in Saudi Arabia, and building a robust pipeline for sustainable growth
  
  
\*\*This role is exclusively for Saudi nationals. Please note that we do not offer sponsorship or relocation for this position.
  
  
About S&P Global Energy
  
At S&P Global Energy, our comprehensive view of global energy and commodities markets enables our customers to make superior decisions and create long-term, sustainable value. Our four core capabilities are: Platts for news and pricing; CERA for research and advisory; Horizons for energy expansion and sustainability solutions; and Events for industry collaboration.
  
  
**S&P Global Energy is a division of S&P Global (NYSE:** SPGI). S&P Global enables businesses, governments, and individuals with trusted data, expertise, and technology to make decisions with conviction. We are Advancing Essential Intelligence through world-leading benchmarks, data, and insights that customers need in order to plan confidently, act decisively, and thrive economically in a rapidly changing global landscape. Learn more at www.spglobal.com/energy .
  
  
What’s In It For You?
  
  
**Our Mission:**  
Advancing Essential Intelligence.
  
  
**Our People:**  
We're more than 35,000 strong worldwide—so we're able to understand nuances while having a broad perspective. Our team is driven by curiosity and a shared belief that Essential Intelligence can help build a more prosperous future for us all.From finding new ways to measure sustainability to analyzing energy transition across the supply chain to building workflow solutions that make it easy to tap into insight and apply it. We are changing the way people see things and empowering them to make an impact on the world we live in. We’re committed to a more equitable future and to helping our customers find new, sustainable ways of doing business. Join us and help create the critical insights that truly make a difference.
  
  
**Our Values:**  
Integrity, Discovery, Partnership
  
  
Throughout our history, the world's leading organizations have relied on us for the Essential Intelligence they need to make confident decisions about the road ahead. We start with a foundation of integrity in all we do, bring a spirit of discovery to our work, and collaborate in close partnership with each other and our customers to achieve shared goals.
  
  
**Benefits:**  
We take care of you, so you can take care of business. We care about our people. That’s why we provide everything you—and your career—need to thrive at S&P Global.
  
  
**Our benefits include:**  
**Health & Wellness:** Health care coverage designed for the mind and body.
  
  
**Flexible Downtime:** Generous time off helps keep you energized for your time on.
  
  
**Continuous Learning:** Access a wealth of resources to grow your career and learn valuable new skills.
  
  
**Invest in Your Future:** Secure your financial future through competitive pay, retirement planning, a continuing education program with a company-matched student loan contribution, and financial wellness programs.
  
  
**Family Friendly Perks:** It’s not just about you. S&P Global has perks for your partners and little ones, too, with some best-in class benefits for families.
  
  
**Beyond the Basics:** From retail discounts to referral incentive awards—small perks can make a big difference.
  
**For more information on benefits by country visit:** https://spgbenefits.com/benefit-summaries
  
  
**Global Hiring and Opportunity at S&P Global:**  
At S&P Global, we are committed to fostering a connected and engaged workplace where all individuals have access to opportunities based on their skills, experience, and contributions. Our hiring practices emphasize fairness, transparency, and merit, ensuring that we attract and retain top talent. By valuing different perspectives and promoting a culture of respect and collaboration, we drive innovation and power global markets.

title: Communications Associate
description:
Snap Inc

is a technology company. We believe the camera presents the greatest opportunity to improve the way people live and communicate. Snap contributes to human progress by empowering people to express themselves, live in the moment, learn about the world, and have fun together. The Company’s three core products are

Snapchat

, a visual messaging app that enhances your relationships with friends, family, and the world;

Lens Studio

, an augmented reality platform that powers AR across Snapchat and other services; and its AR glasses,

Spectacles

.

The Comms Team is responsible for conveying Snap’s mission, vision and values to core audiences within our community, which include consumers (Snapchatters, their families and their communities), advertising partners, content partners, investors, policymakers, and Snap team members. This passionate multidisciplinary team works hard to show the world what makes Snapchat the best platform for communication and storytelling, and to ensure the narratives about the company, its people, and its products are accurate and compelling.

We’re looking for a Communications Associate to join our team in Riyadh!

What you'll do:

* Be responsible for executing our KSA market communications plan, working closely with the KSA Communications Specialist, as well as the MENA Communications team (Head of MENA Communications and Communications Manager, UAE)
* Surface relevant news, ideas and opportunities for the Communications team in KSA
* Work closely with the Communications team to support them on:

  + Proactive reputation and thought leadership campaigns: including developing campaigns, partnerships and thought leadership that highlights our investment and contribution in KSA.
  + Advertiser communications: educating brands, advertisers and creative agencies about our products, strategy and creative campaigns, driving share of voice in key trade and vertical sector press (including retail, sport, luxury and FMCG).
  + Product communications: including securing press coverage for product updates, launches and a program of proactive engagement, briefings and editorial boards for tech, business, consumer press and influencers.
  + Proactive consumer campaigns and press office: identifying relevant cultural hooks, media opportunities, moments and campaign platforms to show how Snapchat is part of the fabric of daily life for our community.
  + Creator storytelling: Tell the story of our growing and diverse community of Snap Stars (Snapchat creators) in the region, how they use the platform, make a living and why Snapchat is the most authentic place for creators and public figures to engage and build community.
  + Managing our consumer influencer strategy: developing new ways to tell our story through curated campaigns and partnerships with relevant creators and influencers.
* Write to a high standard to feed into media materials and spokespeople briefing documents
* Proactively and reactively pitch stories to press and deliver good results that leverage your existing relationships and knowledge of local media.
* Collaborate with our agency partner to deliver a drumbeat of moments and coverage aligned to our business goals.
* Be part of the cross-functional team in KSA working with teams including Marketing, Talent & Partnerships, Creative Strategy, Business Insights and Sales - to feed into plans that support clear business objectives and needs.
* Project manage key communications projects in the region, delivering on time and holding yourself accountable for high standards
* Regularly communicate with press and influencers, understanding that success means more than just good press coverage, but great relationship building too

Knowledge, Skills, and Abilities

* Understanding of the media and social landscape in KSA - including national, advertising, consumer and technology media, cultural influencers and creators
* Experience of working on relevant communications programmes either in-house or in an agency in KSA
* Experience working with creators to deliver creative content and campaigns
* Strong news judgement
* Ability to balance strategic thinking with tactical execution and attention to detail.
* Ability to prioritise effectively to deliver against business priorities, staging activities with relevant milestones and schedules
* Ability to thrive in a fast-paced environment, make decisions, manage multiple projects simultaneously, and meet tight deadlines
* Ability to build strong relationships cross-functionally and balance the interests of multiple stakeholders
* Enthusiasm and energy for being part of a wider global Communications function, building relationships around the world and supporting colleagues

Minimum qualifications:

* BS/BA degree or equivalent years of experience

If you have a disability or special need that requires accommodation, please don’t be shy and provide us some
