title: Head of Engineering
description:
Do you want to love what you do at work? Do you want to make a difference, an impact, transform peoples lives? Do you want to work with a team that believes in disrupting the normal, boring, and average?

If yes, then this is the job you're looking for ,webook.com is Saudi's #1 event ticketing and experience booking platforms in terms of technology, features, agility, revenue serving some of the largest mega events in the Kingdom surpassing over 2 billion sales.

Key Responsibilities & Technical Focus Areas

**Leadership & Team Enablement**

* Lead and enable engineering teams, fostering a culture of ownership, collaboration, and technical excellence.
* Define and communicate the technical vision, priorities, and roadmap, aligning engineering efforts with business goals.
* Provide guidance and mentorship on architecture, system design, and technical decision-making.
* Drive team performance and operational efficiency, ensuring smooth day-to-day execution.
* Support hiring, onboarding, and career development within the engineering function.

**Technical Oversight & Strategy**

* Oversee system architecture and technical standards, ensuring scalability, reliability, and maintainability.
* Review and approve major technical initiatives, balancing innovation with operational stability.
* Promote engineering best practices in coding, documentation, testing, and observability.
* Contribute to high-impact technical decisions when required, providing hands-on guidance for complex problems.

**Operational Excellence**

* Monitor engineering processes, workflows, and delivery metrics to ensure consistent execution.
* Ensure cross-team alignment, knowledge sharing, and technical consistency across the organization.
* Lead initiatives for incident response, performance monitoring, and post-mortems.
* Act as a point of escalation for complex operational or technical challenges.
* Leverage AI to uncover opportunities that improve product experiences, streamline operations, and enhance team productivity.

**Key Skills**

* Deep expertise in Laravel/PHP backend systems, with experience designing scalable, maintainable, and high-performance platforms.
* Proven ability to lead and enable high-performing engineering teams, setting standards for quality and execution.
* Solid knowledge of software development best practices, including code quality, testing, documentation, and observability.
* Deep understanding of large-scale, high-performance platforms, including SQL/NoSQL, caching, and concurrency.
* Strong strategic and operational planning skills, balancing short-term delivery with long-term system sustainability.
* Excellent written and verbal communication skills (fluent English speaking and writing).
* Experience in Scrum and Agile methodology
* Familiarity with cloud infrastructure (AWS/GCP), CI/CD pipelines, and containerized deployments is a plus.

  
**Requirements**  

* 10+ years of professional software engineering experience.
* 5+ years in a leadership role, guiding teams in a high-growth environment.

* Proven experience delivering high-traffic, mission-critical platforms.
* Demonstrated ability to own technical strategy, operational processes, and team enablement.
* Bachelor’s degree in Computer Science or a related field, or equivalent practical experience.
* Experience contributing to open-source projects or technical thought leadership is a plus.

title: Senior Finance Consultant: Corporate Strategy & Research (Remote Advisory)
Head of Project Excellence (PMO) - Middle East & India
description:
Who we are

Do you want to join our Geo-data revolution? Fugro’s global reach and unique know-how will put the world at your fingertips. Our love of exploration and technical expertise help us to provide our clients with invaluable insights. We source and make sense of the most relevant Geo-data for their needs, so they can design, build and operate their assets more safely, sustainably and efficiently. But we’re always looking for new talent to take the next step with us. For bright minds who enjoy meaningful work and want to push our pioneering spirit further. For individuals who can take the initiative but work well within a team.

At the core of our work, we deliver insights to our clients through projects in Land and Marine. We are seeking a Head of Project Excellence who can deploy the Fugro project way of working, manage our regional portfolio and connect to all enabling functions and business lines to ensure delivery excellence.

As the Head of Project Excellence for the Middle-East and India region, you are responsible for orchestrating, assessing and deploying project management processes, providing project management leadership aimed at both professionalising the project management profession and significant improvement of project management competency in the region, as well as Delivery Excellence - the planning and execution of high contract value complex multi-disciplinary projects. You will also provide oversight and functional management of key regional internal projects that will advance regional objectives. The position is considered as a true business partner which provides value cross-functionally and across Business and Service Lines across the region.

Key Responsibilities:

* Provide the vision and leadership to elevate project management as a core professional competency across all Business Lines in the MEI region.
* Build, mentor, and deploy a high-performing regional pool of project management talent. Lead the regional project management community through communication, events, mentoring, and capability‑building.
* Translate global project management strategy & processes into a regional roadmap and drive its successful rollout.
* Develop and implement best‑practice project management processes, systems, and governance frameworks.
* Oversee performance of large, complex projects and drive the portfolio across the region.
* Partner with Commercial Excellence, Procurement, Supply Chain, Legal, Finance, and BL leadership to drive improvements across the full project lifecycle.
* Identify and manage key risks and opportunities, strengthening project controls and reducing regional exposure.
* Drive service quality, ensuring projects meet commitments on safety, budget, schedule, and technical accuracy.
* Champion QHSSE, continuous improvement, lessons learned, and project management audit follow-up.

What Skills & Experience Will You Have?

* Bachelor’s degree in engineering, Business, or related field; master’s preferred.
* Demonstrated proficiency in stakeholder management, risk assessment, integrated change control, effective communication, and cross-functional collaboration.
* Proven extensive experience managing large, complex engineering or technical projects.
* Demonstrated proven leadership of multi‑disciplinary teams across diverse locations.
* PMP (or IPMA equivalent) and ideally advanced certifications such as PgMP, PfMP, PMI‑PMOCP, or Change Management.
* Strong analytical, problem-solving, and decision-making capabilities.
* High proficiency in project management tools, MS Office, and modern digital workflows.
* Thorough understanding of engineering documentation, contractual frameworks, cash management and project-related legal terminology.
* Discipline in planning, prioritisation, and execution under pressure and changing conditions.

What we offer

Fugro provides a positive work environment as well as projects that will satisfy the most curious minds. We also offer great opportunities to stretch and develop yourself. By giving you the freedom to grow faster, we think you’ll be able to do what you do best, better. Which should help us to find fresh ways to get to know the earth better. We encourage you to be yourself at Fugro. So, bring your energy and enthusiasm, your keen eye and can-do attitude. But bring your questions and opinions too. Because to be the world’s leading Geo-data specialist, we need the strength in depth that comes from a diverse, driven team.

Our view on diversity, equity and inclusion

At Fugro, our people are our superpower. Their variety of viewpoints, experiences, knowledge and talents give us collective strength. Distinctive beliefs and diverse backgrounds are therefore welcome, but discrimination, harassment, inappropriate behaviour and unfair treatment are not. Everybody is to be well-supported and treated fairly. And everyone must be valued and have their voice heard. Crucially, we believe that getting this right brings a sense of belonging, of safety and acceptance, that makes us feel more connected to Fugro’s purpose ‘together create a safe and liveable world’ – and to each other.

What’s in it for you?

At Fugro, our people are our number one priority and central to our purpose to create a safe and livable world. Our values set the foundation for our unique culture: we are determined to deliver, we prepare for tomorrow, we do what’s right, and we build trust. Our talent philosophy is driven by our values and fueled by a passion for learning, developing leadership behaviors, transparency, and accountability. Fugro offers opportunities to sharpen skills and provide career growth through on-the-job learning experiences, LinkedIn Learning access, business and technical training, and leadership development programs. We also offer competitive benefits packages including hybrid working to support you in your career journey with us.

Disclaimer for recruitment agencies:

Fugro does not accept any unsolicited applications from recruitment agencies. Acquisition to Fugro Recruitment or any Fugro employee is not appreciated\*\*.\*\*

title: Dean of College of Health Science (CHS)
description:
### **Job Details**

The **American University in the Emirates (AUE)** is seeking a highly qualified and experienced individual to serve as **Dean of the College of Health Sciences (CHS)**. This senior leadership position is critical in providing strategic, academic, and administrative leadership to the college. The Dean will ensure academic excellence, foster research and innovation, and build strong partnerships with healthcare organizations, government entities, accreditation bodies, and industry stakeholders.

### **Purpose**

The Dean provides visionary leadership for the College of Health Sciences by collaborating with faculty, senior university leadership, healthcare industries, government sectors, and community partners to advance education, research, and professional practice in health sciences.

### **Summary**

The Dean of the College of Health Sciences is the chief academic and administrative officer of the college. The role is responsible for strategic planning, academic quality, faculty development, student success, accreditation, research advancement, and financial sustainability, while ensuring alignment with AUE’s mission, vision, and strategic goals.

### **Minimum Qualifications and Experience**

* Ph.D. or equivalent terminal degree in Health Sciences, Public Health, Nursing, Allied Health, Healthcare Administration, or a related field.
* Minimum of **5 years of academic leadership experience** (Associate Dean or higher) at an accredited university.
* A strong record of **teaching, research, and service** in health sciences.
* Demonstrated engagement with healthcare institutions, regulatory bodies, and government agencies.
* Proven experience in **strategic planning, program development, accreditation, and faculty leadership**.
* Excellent leadership, communication, and decision-making skills.

### **Preferred Skills**

* Experience with **international and professional accreditation bodies** (e.g., CAA, WFME, CCNE, ACEN, or equivalent).
* Knowledge of emerging trends in **healthcare education, clinical training, digital health, and interdisciplinary learning**.
* Experience in **fundraising, grant acquisition, and budget management**.
* Ability to foster a **collaborative, inclusive, and research-driven academic environment**.

### **Reporting & Supervision**

The Dean supervises and provides leadership to:

* Associate Dean(s)
* Department Chair(s)
* Program Director(s)
* College Coordinator(s)

Key Responsibilities

### **1. Strategic Leadership**

* Provide visionary leadership to advance the mission and strategic priorities of the College of Health Sciences.
* Align academic programs and initiatives with national, regional, and international healthcare trends.

### **2. Academic Excellence**

* Oversee curriculum development, program delivery, assessment, and continuous improvement.
* Ensure academic programs meet international standards and professional healthcare requirements.

### **3. Faculty Development**

* Recruit, mentor, evaluate, and support faculty in teaching, research, and service.
* Promote professional development, scholarship, and clinical engagement.

### **4. Research & Innovation**

* Foster a strong research culture in health sciences, public health, and applied clinical research.
* Support faculty and students in securing research grants and publishing scholarly work.

### **5. Student Success**

* Enhance student recruitment, retention, progression, and employability.
* Strengthen clinical training, internships, and experiential learning opportunities.

### **6. Healthcare & Community Partnerships**

* Build and maintain partnerships with hospitals, clinics, healthcare organizations, and government agencies.
* Promote collaborative initiatives that enhance healthcare education and workforce readiness.

### **7. Resource & Financial Management**

* Oversee budgeting, staffing, and effective resource allocation within the college.
* Support revenue generation through partnerships, grants, and academic initiatives.

### **8. Policy & Professional Engagement**

* Represent the college in professional, regulatory, and policy-related forums.
* Contribute to healthcare education policy development at institutional and national levels.

### **9. Diversity, Equity & Inclusion**

* Promote equity, diversity, and inclusion across academic programs, faculty, and students.
* Foster a culturally responsive and inclusive learning environment.

### **10. Accreditation & Compliance**

* Ensure compliance with institutional policies, accreditation standards, and regulatory requirements.
* Lead accreditation reviews and continuous quality assurance processes.

### **11. Advancement & Fundraising**

* Identify and secure external funding opportunities aligned with the university’s advancement strategy.
* Build relationships with donors, sponsors, and strategic partners.

### **12. Additional Duties**

* Perform other responsibilities as assigned by the university’s senior leadership.

  

**About American University in the Emirates (AUE):**

**The American University in the Emirates (AUE)** invites applications from well-qualified candidates for a range of faculty and administrative positions. AUE is located in Dubai Intl. Academic City.

AUE is not just a place of learning but a hub of innovation and growth, where your expertise and aspirations find a welcoming environment.

At AUE, we believe Nothing is Impossible is the Pathway to Success

AUE comprises seven dynamic colleges: College of Law, College of Education, College of Design, College of Business Administration, College of Media and Mass Communication, College of Computer Information Technology and College of Security and Strategic Studies. Each college boasts unique strengths and prestigious accreditations, reflecting our commitment to providing a world-class education.

The American University in the Emirates is accredited by **SACSCOC (the Southern Association of Colleges and Schools Commission on Colleges)** to award baccalaureate and master’s degrees. Degree-granting institutions also may offer credentials such as certificates and diplomas at approved degree levels

The American University in the Emirates is officially licensed to operate as a higher education institution and all its programs are accredited by **CAA (the Commission for Academic Accreditation)**, Ministry of Education, United Arab Emirates.

The College of Business Administration is a proud member of **AACSB (The Association to Advance Collegiate Schools of Business)**, and its degree programs **(Bachelor of Business Administration, Master of Business Administration, Master of Sport Management) are accredited by AACSB) as of 2022.**

The Bachelor of Computer Science in the **College of Computer Information Technology** is accredited by the Computing Accreditation Commission of **ABET.**

**NASAD (The National Association of Schools of Art and Design)** has granted the Bachelor of Science in Fashion Design, Bachelor of Science in Graphic Design, Bachelor of Science in Interior Design, and Bachelor of Science in Animation in the College of Design, the designation of Substantial Equivalency with accredited programs in the United States.

We're an international bank, nimble enough to act, big enough for impact. For more than 170 years, we've worked to make a positive difference for our clients, communities, and each other. * **A continuous learning culture** to support your growth, with opportunities to reskill and upskill and access to physical, virtual and digital learning.
* **Being part of an inclusive and values driven organisation,** one that embraces and celebrates our unique diversity, across our teams, business functions and geographies - everyone feels respected and can realise their full potential.
